mapper.sql: SELECT mo.move_id, mo.move_no, mo.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, mo.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, mo.batch_no, mo.from_location_id, lf.warehouse_code as from_location_code, lf.warehouse_name as from_location_name, mo.to_location_id, lt.warehouse_code as to_location_code, lt.warehouse_name as to_location_name, mo.move_qty, mo.status, mo.approve_by, mo.approve_time, mo.complete_time, mo.del_flag, mo.create_by, mo.create_time, mo.update_by, mo.update_time, mo.remark FROM wms_move_order mo LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON mo.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON mo.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse lf ON mo.from_location_id = lf.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse lt ON mo.to_location_id = lt.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_move_order (move_no, warehouse_id, material_id, batch_no, from_location_id, to_location_id, move_qty, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{moveNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{materialId}, #{batchNo}, #{fromLocationId}, #{toLocationId}, #{moveQty}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_move_order SET del_flag = '2' WHERE move_id IN #{moveId}
